subject: Girafarig, the Long Neck Pokemon — Johto Normal/Psychic-type giraffe-like creature with a second smaller head on its tail
description: A giraffe-like creature stands in a sunny savanna-style environment with sparse trees and warm light in the background. The creature has a yellow-tan body with dark spot markings and a long neck. Its tail visibly terminates in a second small head with dark coloring, a defining feature of the species. The creature appears to be standing in profile, facing left, in a calm pose. The background includes trees and what appears to be open grassland under warm daylight conditions.
foreground: giraffe-like creature standing in profile, tail-head visible
